description: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Mentioning 'the consul.' Currency: ashrafī. There is also a list of the months of the Franks along with how many days are in each. It is unclear which European language these correspond to, but perhaps it is Italian ("ottobrio" as given here seems to be an archaic form of "ottobre").
description_he: חשבונות בערבית-יהודית. מוזכר 'הקונסול'. מטבע: אשרפי. כמו כן רשימת חודשי הפרנקים עם מספר הימים שבכל אחד מהם.
